License: BSD-3-Clause
Repository license path: third-party/licenses/openvr/LICENSE.txt
License SHA-256: f56ff606104d4ef18e617921a75c73ad73b5a1a1d70c69590c29de16919e04ad

The official openvr_api.dll and its detached signature are retained from the exact tag archive without modification. The runtime DLL is intended to be staged beside vrrecorder_native.dll; no Steam installation copy or ambient PATH entry is accepted as the product dependency. The copyright notice, BSD-3-Clause conditions, and disclaimer must remain in the product Legal Bundle and third-party notices.
